title: Genetic Variability at An Allosteric site of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase Across Coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 Samples
author: Setayesh Yazdani
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report is about the druggability and genetic variability at an allosteric site of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase both across coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 samples. This report accompanies  this post  on openlabnotebook.org.
steps_raw: This report is about the druggability and genetic variability at an allosteric site of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase both across coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 samples. This report accompanies  this post  on openlabnotebook.org.
